name: SOUTHERN ITS INTERNATIONAL, INC.
business: Southern ITS International, Inc. provides proprietary equipment and services for government regulated high compliance industries, including electronic security and networking infrastructure for correctional facilities, gaming, and medical/recreational marijuana sectors. The company also offers phone and data solutions, security system integration, and the Greeniosk Secure Cash Payment System for marijuana dispensaries.

exposures.sentence: Southern ITS offers phone and data products within 3 categories: Cable Infrastructure, Networking, IT Tools and Services.

Southern ITS is committed to the mission of providing total systems integration to casinos worldwide by maintaining cost effectiveness while providing the best possible voice, data, surveillance, audio/visual and fire detection equipment available.
Southern ITS International, Inc has created the first payment to sales technology for marijuana dispensaries called Greeniosk.
